windBreath.method: f0 harmonic subtraction + per-dynamic cross-pitch median
windBreath.source: dense Iowa MIS lossless chromatic AIFF runs, canonically segmented

excluded.reason: lossy coding corrupts low-level broadband noise floors

bandEvidence.floorMethod: quietest 20% of STFT frames in each lossless note source

levelLaw.model: amplitude = windBreathLevel * existingWindBreathLaw(toneBreath, velocity, airflowEnvelope, inefficiency)

placementLaw.model: linear interpolation of per-dynamic median noise_lead_ms; positive leads tone t0
